Introduction

Passionate about code,
obsessed with learning.

Hi! I'm Vicky Kumar, a Computer Science student who loves building things and exploring how technology can solve real-world problems. I enjoy working across multiple languages — from low-level C/C++ to Python, Java, and modern web technologies.

I believe in learning by doing. Every project teaches me something new, and I continuously challenge myself to grow — whether that's sharpening my DSA skills on LeetCode or shipping a new project from scratch.
